keyMappings:
# Disable all default key bindings first
unmapAll



# Essential commands
map ? showHelp

# Navigation (matching nvim's movement)
map h scrollLeft
map l scrollRight
map j scrollDown
map k scrollUp
map gg scrollToTop
map G scrollToBottom
map <c-f> scrollPageDown
map <c-b> scrollPageUp

# Tab/Buffer navigation (matching nvim's buffer navigation)
map H previousTab
map L nextTab

# Leader key patterns (Space as leader, matching nvim)
map <space>t Vomnibar.activateTabSelection
map <space>b Vomnibar.activateBookmarksInNewTab
map <space>e LinkHints.activateMode
map <space>f LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab
map <space>x removeTab
map <space>X closeOtherTabs
map <space>r reload

# Search (matching nvim's Telescope bindings)
map <space>g Vomnibar.activateInNewTab
map / enterFindMode
map n performFind
map N performBackwardsFind

# Quick actions
map f LinkHints.activateMode
map u restoreTab
map t createTab

# Visual/caret mode
map v enterVisualMode
map V enterVisualLineMode

# Insert mode
map i enterInsertMode

# Yank/copy
map yy copyCurrentUrl
map yf LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue
map <space>y LinkHints.activateModeToCopyLinkUrl

# History navigation
map J goBack
map K goForward
searchEngines:
d: https://duckduckgo.com/?q=%s
g: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s
gh: https://github.com/search?q=%s
maps: https://www.google.com/maps/search/%s
nix: https://search.nixos.org/packages?channel=unstable&query=%s
ytb: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s
scholar: https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%s
dblp: https://dblp.org/search?q=%s
